sections.title: REFERENCES
sections.llm_prompt: Generate a references list for an SOP covering {process_type} for {product_name}. Use GMP prefix conventions (EQ-=Equipment, GN-=General, PR-=Processing, QA-=Quality Assurance, TM-=Test Method). Include parent SOPs, relevant test methods, and regulatory citations. {description}

sections.title: PURPOSE
sections.llm_prompt: Write the Purpose section for an SOP covering {process_type} of {product_name}. State the intent of the procedure in 2-3 sentences. {description}

sections.title: SCOPE
sections.llm_prompt: Write the Scope section for an SOP on {process_type}. State where and to whom this procedure applies, what is included, and what is excluded.

sections.title: DEFINITIONS AND ABBREVIATIONS
sections.llm_prompt: List key definitions and abbreviations used in an SOP for {process_type} of {product_name}. Include at least 5 entries with clear, GMP-appropriate definitions.

sections.title: RESPONSIBILITIES
sections.llm_prompt: List the roles and responsibilities for an SOP covering {process_type}. Include roles such as Operator, Supervisor, Quality Assurance, and Area Manager.

sections.title: SAFETY AND ENVIRONMENTAL
sections.llm_prompt: Write safety and environmental considerations for performing {process_type}. Include PPE requirements, hazards (biological, chemical, mechanical), waste disposal, and emergency procedures.

sections.title: Equipment & Materials
sections.llm_prompt: Generate an equipment and materials list for an SOP on {process_type}.

sections.title: PROCEDURE
sections.llm_prompt: Generate the detailed procedure steps for an SOP covering {process_type} of {product_name}. Use numbered steps (1.0, 1.1, 1.2...), imperative voice, and identify critical parameters. {description}

sections.title: RECORDS
sections.llm_prompt: List the records generated and retained by this SOP for {process_type}. Include record type, storage location, and retention period.
